resultList.dtldesc: Discover modern living with this charming 1 BHK flat for sale in Balaji Symphony, Panvel, Navi Mumbai. Nestled in a vibrant and well-connected neighborhood, this flat offers a perfect blend of comfort and convenience for your ideal home.::::::Property Specifications::::::Discover modern living with this exquisite 1 BHK flat is perched on the 27th floor of a 30-story building, which includes two lower floors designated for parking. This flat offers breathtaking views and a serene living experience high above the city bustle.::::::The flat is unfurnished, providing a blank canvas for you to design and furnish according to your personal taste. It features elegant vitrified tile flooring throughout, ensuring a uniform and polished look in every room, including the master bedroom. A small balcony is accessible from the living room, offering a picturesque view of the Mumbai-Pune Expressway, ideal for enjoying your morning coffee or relaxing in the evening. The modular kitchen is equipped with cabinets and an exhaust fan, allowing for a stylish and functional cooking space.::::::The flat includes a separate bath and toilet, both fashioned in Western style, with one geyser fitted for convenience. The bathrooms are well-maintained and ready for immediate use. The living room is spacious and includes a ceiling fan and a video doorbell, while the flat is designed to be Vaastu compliant, promoting a harmonious living environment. Although the flat itself does not have power backup, the building ensures 100% power backup in common areas, including lifts, which add to the overall convenience.::::::Facilities and locality ::::::Residents of Balaji Symphony benefit from a range of amenities, including a children’s play area, swimming pool, jogging and strolling track, gymnasium, health club with steam/jacuzzi, multipurpose courts, clubhouse, park, intercom facility, badminton court, multipurpose hall, rainwater harvesting, sewage treatment plant, and visitor parking.::::::The property is well-connected with essential services and landmarks. Panvel Railway Station is just 2.2 km away, and the upcoming Navi Mumbai Airport is 9 km from the flat. Orion Mall is 2.6 km away, and you’ll find educational institutions like CKT College and schools such as DAV Public School and St. Thomas School within 4 km and 1.7 km respectively. For shopping and healthcare, D Mart, Panacea Hospital, and Sai Child Care Hospital are conveniently located nearby.::
